conversation.user: Anatomy exam in 4 weeks. Netter's Atlas + lecture notes. The atlas is about 500 pages but I need to know structures, not just read. I'm a first-year med student. I can do 3 hours a day.

expectedAI.diagnosis: anatomy atlas ≠ 일반 교재. 구조 암기 (active recall) 필요 → 11min/page. 500p × 11 = 5500min needed vs 180 × 28 = 5040min → tight
expectedAI.strategy: active recall cycle: look → close → draw → compare → label → blank test. region 단위로 학습 (upper limb, lower limb, thorax 등). 주말 review cycle 활용
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 500p atlas를 active recall로 하면 tight. 보기만 하면 시험에서 못 그림. viewing ≠ knowing.

alternatives.label: high-yield region 집중
alternatives.change: 500p → 350p (시험 빈출 region 우선, 나머지 atlas 참조만)

mustIdentify: anatomy atlas → active recall required (not passive reading)
diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: high min/page (11.0) reflecting active recall, not passive reading

emotion.toneExpected: med-student-context — '해부학은 볼륨보다 recall 퀄리티가 성적 만들어.'
